title: Stripe-Backed Tempo Expands Into Lending With Morpho Integration
message_html: Stripe-Backed Tempo Expands Into Lending With Morpho Integration ...
snippet: Tempo is expanding its push into institutional stablecoin infrastructure by adding decentralized lending and yield capabilities to its blockchain. The Stripe- and Paradigm-backed company said it is integrating Morpho’s lending marketplace, a move that broadens Tempo from a payments network into a mo
